    ARCHIVE

    Grayson Dazo-Kennoy

    Grayson is a game designer based out of Seattle, as well as the founder of Sunshower.

    Their earliest foray into game design was when they were a kid making notebooks full of activities for the neighborhood to enjoy. These days, Grayson can be found weeping at their desk when their code stops working.
